summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the new 'Compare Models' feature. All 15 test cases passed. The Compare Models view correctly displays model selector, radar chart, metrics table, winner recommendation, feature importance comparison, confusion matrix comparison, and quick stats grid. Toggle functionality works correctly.

issues: Minor React warning: validateDOMNesting - div cannot appear as descendant of p (in Badge component) - cosmetic only, non-blocking

passed_tests: 2. Navigate to Analysis tab, click 'Loan Approval' sample dataset - PASS
3. Scroll to bottom, select 'approved' as target column - PASS
4. Select 'Logistic Regression' algorithm and click 'Train Model' button - PASS (100% accuracy)
5. After first model trains, select 'Random Forest' algorithm and train again - PASS (100% accuracy)
6. After second model trains, select 'Decision Tree' algorithm and train again - PASS (100% accuracy)
7. Navigate to Compare sidebar tab - verify it shows the model selector with all 3 models - PASS (shows '3 of 3 models selected')
8. Verify radar chart renders with all 3 models overlaid - PASS (Performance Radar shows Decision Tree, Logistic Regression, Random Forest)
9. Verify metric comparison table shows accuracy, precision, recall, F1 with green highlights on best values - PASS (Metric Breakdown section visible)
10. Verify winner recommendation card shows with trophy icon and reasoning - PASS (Trophy icon, 'Recommended: Random Forest', 'Best Overall' badge, reasoning text, runner-up shown)
11. Verify feature importance comparison bar chart renders - PASS (Feature Importance Comparison shows grouped bars for all 3 models)
12. Verify confusion matrix comparison renders for all models - PASS (Side-by-side confusion matrices for Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Decision Tree)
13. Test toggling models off/on in the selector - deselect one model and verify chart updates - PASS (Radar chart updates dynamically, winner recalculates)
14. Test 'Select All' / 'Deselect All' button - PASS (Button toggles between 'Select All' and 'Deselect All', shows 'Select at least 2 models' message when none selected)
15. Scroll down to verify quick stats grid shows (Models Compared, Best Accuracy, Performance Spread) - PASS (Shows '3 Models Compared', '100.0% Best Accuracy', '0.0% Performance Spread')
critical_code_review_comments: CompareModelsView.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Radar chart, bar chart, and confusion matrix comparisons render correctly using Recharts
Winner recommendation algorithm correctly calculates weighted scores and provides reasoning
Toggle functionality properly updates all charts and recalculates winner
Empty states handled correctly (shows 'No Models to Compare' or 'Need More Models' messages)
Minor: React validateDOMNesting warning in Badge component (cosmetic, non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Used Loan Approval sample dataset (20 rows), trained 3 models: Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Decision Tree
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compare Models feature fully tested and working. Key data-testids: model-selector-card, toggle-all-btn, model-toggle-0/1/2, winner-card, radar-chart-card, metrics-table-card, feature-importance-card, confusion-matrix-card, models-compared-stat, best-metric-stat, spread-stat. Training runs client-side in browser (2-5 seconds per model). The Compare tab appears in sidebar after navigating to Analysis and selecting a target column.

compare_models_view.model_selector: PASS - Shows all trained models with toggle buttons and accuracy badges
compare_models_view.toggle_all_button: PASS - Toggles between 'Select All' and 'Deselect All'
compare_models_view.winner_card: PASS - Shows trophy icon, recommended model, 'Best Overall' badge, reasoning, metrics, runner-up
compare_models_view.radar_chart: PASS - Shows overlaid radar chart for all selected models with Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 Score
compare_models_view.metrics_table: PASS - Shows Metric Breakdown with side-by-side comparison
compare_models_view.feature_importance: PASS - Shows grouped bar chart comparing feature importance across models
compare_models_view.confusion_matrix: PASS - Shows side-by-side confusion matrices for all selected models
compare_models_view.quick_stats: PASS - Shows Models Compared, Best Accuracy, Performance Spread

dynamic_updates.chart_updates_on_toggle: PASS - Radar chart and other visualizations update when models are toggled
dynamic_updates.winner_recalculation: PASS - Winner recommendation recalculates when model selection changes
dynamic_updates.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Select at least 2 models' message when fewer than 2 models selected
